---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for AgenticOrg
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Description

A clear and concise description of the problem this feature would solve.

> Example: "As a finance operator, I need the ability to ... because currently I have to ..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like. Be specific about expected behavior, API changes, new agent capabilities, or workflow modifications.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered and why they are insufficient.

## Domain Affected

Which business domain(s) does this feature impact?

- [ ] Finance
- [ ] HR
- [ ] Marketing
- [ ] Ops
- [ ] Backoffice
- [ ] Platform / Infrastructure
- [ ] Cross-domain

## PRD Reference

If this feature ties to an existing PRD requirement, reference it here:

- **PRD Section:** (e.g., "Section 4.2 — Invoice Processing STP")
- **Test ID(s):** (e.g., PRD-FIN-001, PRD-HR-012)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Impact Assessment

- **STP rate impact:** (Will this improve straight-through-processing? Estimated %)
- **HITL impact:** (Will this add or reduce human-in-the-loop steps?)
- **Budget/cost impact:** (Any expected change in LLM token usage or infrastructure cost?)

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, diagrams, workflow sketches, or references that help explain the request.
